return(function(Q,I,J,L,n,G,c,P,y,j,H,b,k,O,F,x,R,a,v,f,E,V,K,N)R,O,E,x,b,f,N,k,y,F,V,a,H,K,j,P,v=498977+-498977,{},function(Q,D)local I=j(D)local J=function(J,L,n,G,c,b)return y(Q,{J,L;n,G,c,b},D,I)end return J end,function(Q,D)local I=j(D)local J=function(...)return y(Q,{...},D,I)end return J end,{},function(Q,D)local I=j(D)local J=function(J,L)return y(Q,{J,L},D,I)end
